meaning: n.馅饼,杂乱,喜鹊,爱说话的人vt.弄乱
examples: He baited his hook with pie.
We all had a second helping of pie.
He polished off the remains of the apple pie.
Pastel de papas is a potato pie made with milk, eggs, cheese and aniseed.
One block north, hand-painted signs direct you to arguably the best key lime pie that money can buy.
